items.name: check_jsdoc_required
items.signature: pub fn check_jsdoc_required( file_ctx: &FileContext, lines: &[&str], _cfg: &Config, issues: &mut Vec<Issue>, path: &Path, )
items.doc: Check that exported functions/consts have JSDoc comments.
